title: adminloginwithvalidcredentials
description: Test the /api/auth/admin-login endpoint with valid admin or manager email and password credentials to verify successful authentication and receipt of access token.

title: adminloginwithinvalidcredentials
description: Test the /api/auth/admin-login endpoint with invalid credentials to verify that access is denied and an appropriate error message is returned.

title: fetchavailablebranches
description: Test the /api/auth/branches endpoint to retrieve the list of available branches without authentication and verify the response contains correct branch data.

title: listsaleswithbranchfilterandrolebasedaccess
description: Test the /api/admin/sales endpoint with authenticated admin and manager users, applying branch filters to verify sales records are correctly filtered and role-based access controls are enforced.

title: fetchinventoryrecordsbybranch
description: Test the /api/admin/inventory endpoint with authenticated users to retrieve inventory records filtered by branch and verify the data accuracy and audit logging.

title: viewproductcatalogandrestrictmutationsformanagers
description: Test the /api/admin/products endpoint to verify that managers can view the product catalog but cannot perform mutations, while administrators can perform all product catalog operations.

title: fetchreportaccessauditlogsforadminonly
description: Test the /api/admin/reports/audit-logs endpoint to ensure only administrators can access the report access audit logs and verify the correctness of the audit log data.
